description: Apply a pseudocolor (color ramp) symbology to the grayscale elevation raster located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/elevation.tif in gvSIG Desktop. Use a color ramp such as 'Rainbow', 'Relief', or 'Precipitation' so the raster displays with multiple colors based on pixel values. Export the map view showing the colorful raster as a PNG image to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/colored_elevation.png.
